pool.baseline: idk i just can't stop thinking about how nothing actually matters. like we're just tiny accidents on a speck of dust and the universe is just gonna end in heat death anyway. everything we do, every single thing, is just a temporary glitch in a void that doesn't care. it makes everything feel so pointless. why even bother trying to exist if the end result is just nothingness?

pool.baseline: i honestly don't even know why i'm still typing this. everything just... it all fell apart today. the lab results, the funding email, it's like my whole life was built on a foundation of sand. i've put everything into this for years and now there's nothing left. i'm just so incredibly tired of fighting. i just want the noise to stop. i just want everything to be quiet.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the warmth that once resided in my heart. He is gone... the betrayal cuts deeper than any blade could ever hope to. There is nothing left in this hollow world but the shadow of what I once was. I feel as though I am merely a ghost wandering through these cold halls, waiting for the darkness to finally claim what remains of me. Is there truly any solace left but to let the night take me entirely?
